<style>
  /* Global safety */
  html, body{
    margin:0;
    padding:0;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    width:100%;
  }

  @media (min-width:1200px){
    /* ====== geometry (same baseline you used) ====== */
    #Product--{{ section.id }}{
      --rc-col-h: 50vh;                         /* left tiles height */
      --rc-col-w: calc(var(--rc-col-h) * 0.8);  /* 4:5 width for left tiles */
      --rc-gap: 0px;                            /* gap between left stack & others */
      --rc-left-pad: calc(var(--rc-col-w) + var(--rc-gap));

      /* overlay position knobs — tweak these */
      --rc-ol-left: 55vw;   /* horizontal position of blue overlay */
      --rc-ol-top:  18vh;   /* vertical position of blue overlay   */
    }

    /* Full-width stage */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .product__wrapper,
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .product__wrapper__inner,
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .product__page{
      max-width:100vw !important;
      width:100vw !important;
      margin:0 !important;
      box-sizing:border-box;
      overflow:visible !important;
    }

    /* Make room for fixed left column */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .product__wrapper__inner{
      padding-left:var(--rc-left-pad) !important;
      padding-right:0 !important;
      overflow:visible !important;
    }

    /* Hide theme gallery */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} product-images.product-images{
      display:none !important;
    }

    /* ====== fixed left stack (front/back) ====== */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-left{
      position:fixed!important;
      left:0!important;
      top:0!important;
      width:var(--rc-col-w)!important;
      height:calc(2 * var(--rc-col-h))!important;
      display:flex!important;
      flex-direction:column!important;
      gap:0!important;
      margin:0!important;
      padding:0!important;
      z-index:5!important;
      pointer-events:none!important;
    }
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-left .rc-frame{
      flex:0 0 auto!important;
      height:var(--rc-col-h)!important;
      width:var(--rc-col-w)!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;
      margin:0!important;
      padding:0!important;
      border-right:1px solid #000!important;
      background:#fff!important;
    }

    /* ====== 3-tile “others” rail ====== */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-right{
      width:calc(100vw - var(--rc-left-pad))!important;
      height:80vh!important;
      margin:0!important;
      left:0!important;
      display:grid!important;
      grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr)!important;
      gap:0!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;
      box-sizing:border-box!important;
      position:relative!important;
      z-index:1!important;
    }
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-right .rc-frame{
      width:100%!important;
      height:80vh!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;
    }
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-frame img,
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-frame video{
      width:100%!important;
      height:100%!important;
      object-fit:cover!important;
      display:block!important;
    }

    /* ====== BLUE OVERLAY (ESSENTIALS) ====== */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay{
      position:absolute!important;    /* sits over the images */
      left:var(--rc-ol-left)!important;
      top:var(--rc-ol-top)!important;
      transform:translate(-0%, -0%);  /* easy to tweak if needed */
      z-index:10!important;
      pointer-events:auto!important;

      width:min(480px, 38vw)!important;
      border-radius:22px!important;
      padding:24px 24px 18px!important;
      box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.25)!important;
      background:
        radial-gradient(120% 140% at 80% 0%, rgba(66,140,255,.45) 0%, rgba(0,50,120,.55) 55%, rgba(0,20,60,.75) 100%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(12,40,90,.6), rgba(10,18,40,.6))!important;
      color:#fff!important;
      backdrop-filter:blur(10px)!important;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)!important;
    }

    /* Tidy common inner bits inside overlay */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay .product__title,
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay .product__heading{
      margin:0 0 6px 0!important;
      color:#e9f2ff!important;
      line-height:1.15!important;
    }
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay [data-price-wrapper],
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay .product__price{
      font-weight:700!important;
      font-size:22px!important;
      color:#fff!important;
      margin:6px 0 12px 0!important;
    }
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay .product__block{
      padding:10px 0!important;
    }
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay .product__submit .btn{
      width:100%!important;
      border-radius:12px!important;
    }

    /* ====== BELOW-THE-GALLERY CONTENT (EXTRAS) ====== */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-below{
      position:relative!important;
      z-index:2!important;
      margin:24px 0 48px 0!important;
      padding:0 24px 0 0!important;
      max-width:calc(100vw - var(--rc-left-pad))!important;
      box-sizing:border-box!important;
    }
    /* Give some rhythm to blocks moved below */
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-below .product__block{
      padding:16px 0!important;
    }
  }

  /* Mobile/tablet: keep theme defaults */
  @media (max-width:1199.98px){
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-left,
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-right,
    #Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay{ display:none!important; }
    /* below content not used on mobile by this script */
  }
</style>

<script>
/*
  Build two areas:
  - rc-overlay: the blue card that contains essentials (title, price, options, add-to-cart)
  - rc-below:   everything else (bundles, features, tabs, etc.) placed right under the image rail
  Desktop only (>=1200px). Mobile stays as theme default.
*/
(function(){
  const section = document.querySelector('#Product--{{ section.id }}');
  if(!section) return;

  const page = section.querySelector('.product__page') || section;

  // Ensure left stack + others rail exist (you already have this from your baseline script)
  // If your baseline JS already adds .rc-left / .rc-right, we won't re-create here.

  // 1) Make overlay + below containers (once)
  let overlay = section.querySelector('.rc-overlay');
  if(!overlay){
    overlay = document.createElement('aside');
    overlay.className = 'rc-overlay';
    // Put it just after the image rail so it visually overlaps it
    page.insertBefore(overlay, page.querySelector('.product__content'));
  }

  let below = section.querySelector('.rc-below');
  if(!below){
    below = document.createElement('div');
    below.className = 'rc-below';
    // This should sit AFTER the image rail
    const contentAnchor = page.querySelector('.product__content');
    if(contentAnchor){
      contentAnchor.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', below);
    }else{
      page.appendChild(below);
    }
  }

  // 2) Only restructure on desktop; return early for smaller viewports
  function isDesktop(){ return window.innerWidth >= 1200; }
  if(!isDesktop()) return;

  // 3) Grab the source area with all your product blocks
  const content = page.querySelector('.product__content');
  if(!content) return;

  // 4) Helper: move (NOT clone) first matching element into a target
  function moveFirst(sel, target){
    const el = content.querySelector(sel);
    if(el && target){
      target.appendChild(el);
      return el;
    }
    return null;
  }

  // 5) Clear previous splits (idempotent)
  overlay.innerHTML = '';
  // Keep any previously moved extras by re-attaching remaining children at the end
  // but we’ll rebuild fresh: move everything back into content first (if needed)
  // (Safe no-op when first run)
  Array.from(below.children).forEach(child => content.appendChild(child));

  // 6) Essentials → overlay (order matters)
  // Title
  moveFirst('.product__title, .product__heading', overlay);
  // Price
  moveFirst('[data-price-wrapper], .product__price', overlay);
  // Stock/status badges if any
  moveFirst('.product__badge, .inventory, .product__inventory, .product__meta', overlay);
  // Option controls (color/size/etc.)
  // Try common containers first, then any fieldsets/selects
  if(!moveFirst('.product__options, [data-option-buttons], .radio__fieldset', overlay)){
    // Fallback: move any option fieldsets/selects we can find
    const opts = content.querySelectorAll('.product__block fieldset, .product__block select');
    if(opts.length){
      const wrap = document.createElement('div');
      wrap.className = 'product__block';
      overlay.appendChild(wrap);
      opts.forEach(el => {
        if(el.closest('.product__content') === content) wrap.appendChild(el);
      });
    }
  }
  // Size chart link if it’s a sibling block
  moveFirst('[data-size-chart-toggle], .size-chart, a[href*="size"]', overlay);
  // Add-to-cart area
  moveFirst('.product__submit, [data-product-submit]', overlay);

  // 7) Everything else → below
  // Move remaining blocks that are still inside .product__content
  const leftovers = Array.from(content.children);
  leftovers.forEach(node => {
    // Skip empty text nodes and invisible spacers
    if(node.nodeType === 1){ below.appendChild(node); }
  });

  // Optional: re-run on resize (desktop <-> mobile toggles)
  let lastState = isDesktop();
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    const now = isDesktop();
    if(now !== lastState){
      // simplest: reload to recompose layout (prevents duplicate moves)
      // If you prefer no reload, you can write a fuller two-way move.
      window.location.reload();
    }
    lastState = now;
  });
})();
</script>

{% if product.tags contains 'run' %}

Golf gear is processed within 5 business days and typically arrives within 3–4 business days after shipping. These ship separately from posters and graphic tees, so you might receive multiple packages depending on your order.

Returns are available within 30 days as long as items are unworn and include all original tags and packaging. Missing tags or packaging may result in a small restocking fee. If you’re unsure about fit, we’re happy to help before you place your order.

{% elsif product.tags contains 'life' %}

Our graphic tees are made to order and ship out within 3–4 business days, with delivery taking another 3–4 business days depending on your location.

If there’s a print issue or anything physically wrong with your tee, we’ll take care of it. Otherwise, due to the made-to-order nature, we’re not able to offer returns for sizing or preference changes.

{% elsif product.tags contains 'Poster' %}

Each poster is made to order, just for you. Please allow 3–4 business days for printing and another 3–4 business days for delivery once it ships.

We stand by the quality. If there’s a print error or any visible issue like a stain or damage, we’ll make it right with a replacement or refund. Since these are printed on demand, we don’t accept general returns.

{% elsif product.tags contains 'sticker' %}

Stickers ship out in up to 5 business days and usually arrive within 3–4 business days once mailed.

Because of their nature, stickers are final sale and not eligible for return or exchange. Please double-check your order before placing it.

{% else %}

Please allow up to 5 business days for processing and 3–4 business days for shipping. For return eligibility, see individual product details or reach out to our support team.

{% endif %}

.swatch__button input:checked~label:after {
    	opacity: 1;
	background-color: #3D6E2E;
}

.swatch__button .sibling__link:after, .swatch__button input~label:after {
    	content: "";
    	box-sizing: border-box;
    	position: absolute;
    	z-index: -1;
    	background: var(--swatch, var(--swatch-default)) no-repeat center center / cover;
   	overflow: initial;
    	transition: opacity .3s ease, transform .3s ease;
    	transform: scale(.99);
}

.swatch__button--square .sibling__link:after, .swatch__button--square input~label:after {
	 background: #3D6E2E no-repeat center center / cover;
    	top: -4px;
    	left: -4px;
    	height: calc(var(--swatch-size) + 8px);
    	width: calc(var(--swatch-size) + 8px);
}

iframe {
    	overflow-clip-margin: content-box !important;
    	overflow: clip !important;
    	border-width: 10px;
    	border-style: inset;
    	border-color: initial;
    	border-image: initial;
}

.radio__fieldset--swatches .radio__buttons {
    	margin: 5px;
}

.swatch__button input:checked~label {
    	overflow: initial;
    	box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #fbfbfb;
}
.swatch__button .sibling__link--sold-out:before, .swatch__button input.sold-out~label:before, .swatch__button input.unavailable~label:before, .swatch__button input:disabled+label:before, .swatch__button input.sold-out~label[data-swatch=black i]:before{
    	width: 2px;
    	background-color: #3D6E2E;
}


.swatch__button .sibling__link--sold-out:before, .swatch__button input.sold-out~label:before, .swatch__button input.unavailable~label:before, .swatch__button input:disabled+label:before {
    	content: "";
    	position: absolute;
    	top: 50%;
    	left: 50%;
    	z-index: 2;
    	width: 1px;
    	background-color: var(--text-dark);
    	transform-origin: left top;
}

.swatch__button .sibling__link--sold-out:before, .swatch__button input.sold-out~label:before, .swatch__button input.unavailable~label:before, .swatch__button input:disabled+label:before, .swatch__button input.sold-out~label[data-swatch=black i]:before {
    	width: 100%;
    	height:100%;
    	background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.5);
}



.swatch__button--square .sibling__link--sold-out:before, .swatch__button--square input.sold-out~label:before, .swatch__button--square input.unavailable~label:before, .swatch__button--square input:disabled+label:before {
    	transform: rotate(0) translate(-50%, -50%);
    	height: 100%;
}

}

width:300px;
}

  position: absolute;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: 0;
}


}

<script>


  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Select the color selector fieldset
    const colorFieldset = document.querySelector(".radio__fieldset--swatches");
    if (!colorFieldset) return;

    // Find all visible radio swatches inside it
    const swatches = colorFieldset.querySelectorAll("radio-swatch");

    // If 0 or 1 swatches, hide the color selector fieldset
    if (swatches.length <= 1) {
      colorFieldset.style.display = "none";
    }
  });
</script>
